payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Close-up of a partially cropped pillow showing horizontal beige, gray and off-white stripes on a soft woven fabric surface with slight wrinkles; the pillow is edge-cut in the frame and appears photographed at close range (≈0.4 m).
